description: Validate repo-worker restart recovery and side-effect dedupe continuity.
command: cargo test -p alan --lib daemon::state::tests::restore_run_returns_latest_checkpoint_snapshot -- --exact && cargo test -p alan-runtime --lib runtime::tool_orchestrator::tests::test_side_effect_dedupe_survives_session_rollout_recovery_for_file_effects -- --exact
assertions: latest run checkpoint is restorable after restart
duplicate irreversible repo-worker effects are skipped on recovery
